string.text: {=4WEdpXUf}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=EvSArfTs}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, a noble clan of the Marinid Sultanate.

{=dJRWgNmv}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Our family has stood in the Imperial Court and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the Marinid Sultanate.

{=ijQhrXMW}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the Marinid Sultanate.
{=zZ9FQJRI}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, the most ancient and noble of the Berber tribes.

{=Y8rYJaOa}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of the Marinid Sultanate. The Christians we have slain, and the glory we have won, is second to none.
